output.answer: No buildings with a height larger than 350 meters that are built or in construction were found in the Wikidata knowledge graph based on the provided query. This may be due to incomplete data or specific filtering constraints in the knowledge graph.
output.formatted:
No buildings with a height larger than 350 meters that are built or in construction were found in the Wikidata knowledge graph based on the provided query. This may be due to incomplete data or specific filtering constraints in the knowledge graph.

SPARQL query over wikidata:
```sparql
PREFIX wdt: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct/>
PREFIX wdtn: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/direct-normalized/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
SELECT DISTINCT ?building WHERE {
  ?building wdt:P31 wd:Q44403 .
  ?building wdtn:P2048 ?heightValue .
  FILTER(?heightValue > 350)
  ?building wdt:P1344 ?status .
  VALUES ?status {
    wd:Q132035 wd:Q7358874
  }
}
```

Execution result:
Got no rows and 1 columns
